category_sources: source_facts.description says command-line interface for the Convox PaaS; official README describes Convox as an open-source PaaS based on Kubernetes.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is Convox; source_facts.name is convox.
docs_sources: Official Convox docs include getting started introduction and detailed CLI reference pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/convox/convox, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the Convox PaaS CLI; official README lists Kubernetes-based PaaS support across major cloud providers.
